      class  FigureView<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> 
      void      		 VectorialExporter.write(File output, G graph, ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
      Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.

      Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.

      Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.

      Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, and the view objects stored in the given container.

      Exports the specified graph, its figures and all the other figures in the specified container into the given stream.

      class  JFigureView<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
      This class provides a viewer for manipulating graphical network The editor (JFigurePanel) is the central class of the graph editing framework.
